mapper.sql: r.id, r.user_id, r.product_id, r.equipment_unit_id, eu.display_code AS equipment_display_code, r.source_quote_id, r.start_at, r.end_at, r.expires_at, r.status, CASE WHEN r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.expires_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) THEN 'EXPIRED' ELSE r.status END AS effective_status, r.currency, r.pricing_version, r.pricing_rule, r.billing_days, r.daily_rate, r.rental_amount, r.deposit_amount, r.total_amount, r.rounding_mode
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO reservation_idempotency ( id, user_id, endpoint, idempotency_key, request_digest, status, retain_until ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{endpoint}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{requestDigest}, 'PROCESSING', TIMESTAMPADD(HOUR, 24, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)) )
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation_idempotency SET status = 'COMPLETED', response_http_status = #{httpStatus}, response_code = #{responseCode}, response_body = #{responseBody}, resource_id = #{resourceId}, retain_until = TIMESTAMPADD(HOUR, 24, #{reservationExpiresAt}), completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'

UPDATE reservation_idempotency SET status = 'FAILED', response_http_status = #{httpStatus}, response_code = #{responseCode}, response_body = #{responseBody}, retain_until = TIMESTAMPADD(HOUR, 24, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)), completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM reservation_user_guards WHERE user_id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_reservations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory_reservations ( id, user_id, product_id, equipment_unit_id, source_quote_id, start_at, end_at, expires_at, status, currency, pricing_version, pricing_rule, billing_days, daily_rate, rental_amount, deposit_amount, total_amount, rounding_mode, price_snapshot ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{quote.productId}, #{equipmentUnitId}, #{quote.quoteId}, #{quote.startAt}, #{quote.endAt}, #{expiresAt}, 'ACTIVE', #{quote.currency}, #{quote.pricingVersion}, #{quote.pricingRule}, #{quote.billingDays}, #{quote.dailyRate}, #{quote.rentalAmount}, #{quote.depositAmount}, #{quote.totalAmount}, #{quote.roundingMode}, #{quote.priceSnapshot} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM inventory_reservations r JOIN equipment_units eu ON eu.id = r.equipment_unit_id WHERE r.id = #{reservationId}
SELECT FROM inventory_reservations r JOIN equipment_units eu ON eu.id = r.equipment_unit_id WHERE r.id = #{reservationId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_reservations SET status = 'RELEASED', released_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{reservationId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
UPDATE inventory_reservations SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE id = #{reservationId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND expires_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id FROM inventory_reservations WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND expires_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) ORDER BY expires_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{batchSize} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update:
UPDATE inventory_reservations SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND expires_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) AND id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS reservation_id, r.user_id, r.product_id, r.equipment_unit_id, eu.display_code AS equipment_display_code, eu.status AS equipment_status, r.start_at, r.end_at, r.expires_at, r.status, CASE WHEN r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.expires_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) THEN 'EXPIRED' ELSE r.status END AS effective_status, r.currency, r.pricing_version, r.pricing_rule, r.billing_days, r.daily_rate, r.rental_amount, r.deposit_amount, r.total_amount, r.rounding_mode, r.price_snapshot, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) AS database_now FROM inventory_reservations r JOIN equipment_units eu ON eu.id = r.equipment_unit_id WHERE r.id = #{reservationId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_reservations SET status = 'CONSUMED', consumed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{reservationId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) AND start_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
UPDATE inventory_reservations SET status = 'RELEASED', released_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{reservationId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE inventory_reservations SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE id = #{reservationId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND expires_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
